title: Bold Y2K Japanese Street-Editorial Collage Poster
sourceTitle: Y2k Japanese Street Editorial Portrait Collage Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Bold Y2K Japanese street-editorial collage poster featuring adult Japanese street-fashion model with messy tied-up hair with a clean high-fashion magazine aesthetic. Subject: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Scene: Urban Tokyo-inspired design with gritty paper textures, torn magazine cutouts, distressed ink splashes, subtle Japanese street signs, barcode stickers, newspaper scraps, tape pieces, and layered paper collage effects. Composition: Top section holds one large close-up portrait; bottom section contains only two smaller ripped-polaroid portrait frames showing different facial expressions and angles; oversized bold Japanese typography and minimal English text integrate into a premium editorial magazine layout. Signature Elements: confident innocent expression with glossy lips and intense eye focus supplies the swappable expression detail detail for this template. Preserved y2k japanese street editorial portrait collage poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Edgy yet clean Y2K Japanese fashion zine, RAW DSLR realism, editorial streetwear moodboard, cinematic shadows, sharp eye detail, premium graphic design, 8K ultra-detailed collage poster. Color Palette: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Lighting: Soft dramatic portrait lighting, cinematic shadow shaping, sharp eye highlights, realistic skin texture, and clean graphic-design readability. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
